Module 1:  
The number of rooms requiring attention follows a Poisson distribution with a mean of 20. To find the probability that exactly 15 rooms need attention, we use the Poisson probability formula:  
P(X = 15) = (e⁻²⁰ × 2⁰¹⁵) / 15!  

Module 2:  
The concierge assists with 8 concerns and has a 90% success rate. To find the probability that at least 7 of these concerns are resolved successfully, we use the binomial probability formula:  
P(X ≥ 7) = 1 - P(X ≤ 6)
